actions.expression:
SELECT buyercodeapply.sid,
       buyercodeapply.wfgs,
       buyercodeapply.clientNo,
       buyercodeapply.countryCode1,
       buyercodeapply.engName1,
       buyercodeapply.engAddress1,
       buyercodeapply.chnName1,
       buyercodeapply.chnAddress1,
       buyercodeapply.tel1,
       buyercodeapply.fax1,
       buyercodeapply.ywbm,
       buyercodeapply.ywry,
       buyercodeapply.jhfs,
       buyercodeapply.glbz,
       buyercodeapply.clientNo1,
       buyercodeapply.regNo,
       buyercodeapply.corpSerialNo,
       buyercodeapply.setDate1,
       buyercodeapply.regyear1,
       buyercodeapply.corporation1,
       buyercodeapply.companyType,
       buyercodeapply.Business,
       buyercodeapply.mflxr,
       buyercodeapply.eMail
FROM buyercodeapply 
WHERE (buyercodeapply.buyerNo1=:buyerNo) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY buyercodeapply.sid DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT buyercodeapply.buyerNo1
FROM buyercodeapply
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (buyercodeapply.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (buyercodeapply.sys_path LIKE :c_depart)))
ORDER BY buyercodeapply.corpSerialNo1 ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   ((ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%外销%") or (ywrybiao.zw like "%跟单%")) and (ywrybiao.zt not like "%离职%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC
